description: TTL and invalidation rules governing Alice's world-state cache. Loaded at agent startup and referenced by the cache manager before any entity read or write.

person.notes: Relationship-tier A persons refresh more aggressively; see tier_overrides below.

company.notes: Company records are more stable than person records; domain matching drives deduplication.

project.notes: Projects go stale fast. No update in 7 days → status set to 'stalled' automatically.

opportunity.notes: Opportunities require frequent re-evaluation. Alice flags if no next_action_date within TTL.

meeting.notes: Meeting records are largely immutable once created. Invalidated only if a better transcript arrives.

decision.notes: Decisions are append-only by default. To reverse a decision, create a new decision entity.

thread.notes: Thread status auto-transitions to 'stale' when last_activity exceeds stale_after_days.

tier_overrides.description: Relationship-tier A persons have tighter freshness windows.

reconciliation_rules.description: If two person entities share an email address, flag for merge. Keep the record with higher confidence as canonical.
If two company entities share a domain, flag for merge.
Never silently overwrite a field whose new value contradicts the stored value and confidence >= 0.8. Instead, append to a '_conflicts' array and surface for review.
Any merge where either source confidence < 0.7 must be flagged for human review before the canonical record is updated.
Every entity write must include a provenance block. Writes without provenance are rejected.

cache_warming_schedule.description: When Alice should proactively refresh cache layers, even without an explicit user trigger.

nightly.description: Nightly 2 AM local time: refresh all stale entities, regenerate daily brief, run reconciliation pass.

pre_meeting.description: 30 minutes before any calendar event with external participants: warm meeting prep brief.

on_email_batch.description: After each email fetch: update person/thread/opportunity entities touched by the batch.

on_transcript_import.description: When a transcript file lands in inbox/: extract entities, decisions, action items.

manual_refresh.description: User-triggered full refresh of a specific entity or entity type.

daily_brief.description: Daily brief regenerated nightly or when any P0 entity changes.

meeting_prep_brief.description: Meeting prep brief is short-lived; always regenerated before each meeting.

follow_up_queue.description: Follow-up queue rebuilt when threads or open_loops change.
